text:
IT IS ORDERED THAT:

[Insert name of bank etc.] shall, by its officers or agents provide all information within its possession, custody or control relating to the whereabouts of the respondent [respondent name and date of birth] and of the subject child[ren] [child(ren)’s name(s) and date(s) of birth] and particularly information and documents as follows:

Whether the respondent holds any [bank account] / building society account] / [credit card] with [insert name of bank etc].

In the event that the respondent does hold any [bank account] / building society account] / [credit card] with [insert name of bank etc], to specify with which branch the [bank account] / building society account] / [credit card] is held.

In the event that the respondent does hold any [bank account] / building society account] / [credit card] with [insert name of bank etc], to specify the registered address of is the [bank account] / building society account] / [credit card].

Provide copy [bank] / [buildings society account] / [credit card] statements from [date] to [date], together with any additional information as may be required in order to interpret the information provided.

Such information shall be provided forthwith upon service of this order upon them to the solicitors for the applicant [applicant firm name].

The solicitors for the applicant are granted permission to serve a copy of this order by email or facsimile.

[Insert name of bank etc.] is prohibited from informing the respondents of the making of this order or any action taken in compliance with it.

The costs incurred by [insert name of bank etc.] in complying with this order, which the solicitors for the applicant [father] / [mother] have undertaken to pay by virtue of [para 8(b)] / [para numbers] above, are considered by the court to be a reasonable disbursement on the applicant’s public funding certificate.

Costs be reserved.

Dated [date]

Notice

You [applicant solicitor name] may be fined or sent to prison for contempt of court if you break the promise that have been given to the court

Statement of understanding
I understand the undertakings that I have given, and that if I break any of my promises to the court I may be fined or sent to prison for contempt of court

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the High Court of Justice
